summary: Comprehensive testing of Devis (Quotes) module completed successfully. Backend APIs working with 94.1% success rate (16/17 tests passed), frontend UI fully functional with complete workflow testing including creation, status management, and conversion to contracts.

resolved_bugs.issue: MongoDB serialization error with datetime.date objects
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Modified contract creation to use string format for dates instead of date objects

navigation_issues.issue: Devis section not visible in main navigation menu
navigation_issues.impact: Medium - users need to navigate directly to quotes URL

passed_tests: Backend: Quote creation (both billing modes: par_seance and tarif_horaire)
Backend: Quote listing and filtering by status
Backend: Quote status workflow (brouillon -> envoye -> accepte)
Backend: Error handling for non-existent resources
Frontend: Quote listing page with statistics (Total: 5, Brouillons: 2, Envoyés: 1, Acceptés: 2)
Frontend: Quote creation form with child selection and billing mode options
Frontend: Quote detail page with action buttons (Modifier, Envoyer, Dupliquer)
Frontend: Status change workflow (Send -> Accept -> Convert to Contract)
Frontend: Quote access from child detail page via 'Nouveau devis' button
Frontend: Form validation and error handling
Frontend: French localization and proper UI labels
action_item_for_main_agent: Add 'Devis' navigation menu item to main navigation sidebar for better user accessibility. The quotes module is fully functional but requires direct URL navigation.

success_percentage.overall: 97% (excellent functionality with minor navigation enhancement needed)
